PURPOSE ------- Stores a trust score (0\u2013100) per agent per run on-chain. Your Next.js gauge panels read from this contract in real time. DECISIONS LOCKED IN (from design doc) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 1. ACCESS CONTROL    \u2192 onlyOwner.  Only your wallet can call updateScore().                        Prevents anyone on Monad testnet from faking scores. 2. SCORE CALCULATION \u2192 Python (Scorer agent) computes the value and passes it in.                        Contract just stores it.  Simple, hackathon-safe. 3. RESET BEHAVIOUR   \u2192 Resets per run (runId-based).                        mapping: agentId \u2192 runId \u2192 score                        Every new demo run starts at 0.  Judges see a fresh score.                        Cumulative history still queryable for any past runId. 4. SAFETY RAIL       \u2192 require(score <= 100) inside updateScore().                        A Python bug pushing 999 won't break the frontend gauges. DEPLOY ORDER \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 1. Deploy TrustScoreRegistry  \u2192  save TRUST_SCORE_ADDRESS 2. Deploy AgentAuditLog(TRUST_SCORE_ADDRESS) You do NOT need to call setAuditLog() here because access is onlyOwner, not onlyAuditLog \u2014 your FastAPI wallet calls updateScore() directly.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/TrustScoreRegistry.sol":"TrustScoreRegistry"},"evmVersion":"shanghai","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/TrustScoreRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7a58cd3abc1d9055af708d465520db323a80a68a13a8293c437eb09d1bda8ab4","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7da501fa79389f1851b38125321f839c09cb681766d77bd854f128fb12e7f132","dweb:/ipfs/QmT6N86pyornHjDBfxqqCm61vfbzwbtsSRQdMG9nUWGHS6"]}},"version":1}

constructor.details: Sets the deployer wallet as owner.      Run once: npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network monad_testnet

getLatestRunId().details: FastAPI can call this to confirm the current runId is registered.         Returns an empty string if no runs exist yet.

getRunCount().details: Used by the UI to show "X demo runs completed" and paginate history.

getRunLeaderboard(string).details: Returns parallel arrays: agentIds[] and their scores[].         Frontend zips them together for the leaderboard table.

getScore(string,string).details: Cheapest read — used by the gauge panels in Next.js.         Polls this every few seconds or triggers on ScoreUpdated event.

returns._0: uint256  Current score (0–100).  Returns 0 if not yet scored.

getScoreFull(string,string).details: Used by the Trust Score panel to show score + last updated time         + whether scoring has started yet for this agent.

getScoreHistory(string,string).details: Used by the sparkline chart in the audit panel.         Returns every ScoreUpdate ever pushed for this agent+run.

resetRun(string).details: Optional utility — call this if you want to cleanly restart a demo         run without deploying a new contract.  Clears both current scores         and history for every agent in this run.         NOTE: This does NOT delete the run from allRunIds — the run is still         visible in history, just with cleared scores.

updateScore(string,string,uint256,string.details: Called by FastAPI after the Scorer agent returns a score.         Python computes the score value; this contract just stores it.         SAFETY RAIL: if score > 100, we clamp to 100, emit a warning,         and continue — we do NOT revert, so the demo never halts from         a Python bug pushing an out-of-range value.

params.reason: Short label, e.g. "web_search_complete" — shown in audit panel Python side (Web3.py):   contract.functions.updateScore("researcher", run_id, 87, "web_search_complete")           .build_transaction({from: account.address, gas: 150000, nonce: nonce})
params.runId: e.g. "run_20240115_001" — unique per demo run, set by FastAPI
params.score: 0–100.  Python's Scorer agent computes and passes this in.

allRunIds(uint256).notice: Ordered list of all runIds — for UI pagination.

getLatestRunId().notice: Returns the most recent runId — the active demo run.

getRunCount().notice: Total number of runs ever recorded.

getRunLeaderboard(string).notice: Get scores for ALL agents in a run — for the leaderboard view.

getScore(string,string).notice: Get the current score for an agent in a run.

getScoreFull(string,string).notice: Get full score record — current score + metadata.

getScoreHistory(string,string).notice: Get the full score history for an agent in a run.

hasScore(string,string).notice: agentId → runId → bool (has at least one score been set?)         Needed to distinguish "score=0 because not started" from         "score=0 because agent failed everything".

lastUpdatedAt(string,string).notice: agentId → runId → last updated timestamp         Separate field so the UI can show "last updated X sec ago"         without loading the full history array.

owner().notice: Contract deployer — only this address can update scores.

resetRun(string).notice: Reset all scores for a given runId to zero.

runAgents(string,uint256).notice: Tracks all runIds ever used — for the leaderboard view.         runId → agentId[] (which agents ran in this run)

runExists(string).notice: runId → bool  — so we can check if a runId exists.

scoreHistory(string,string,uint256).notice: agentId → runId → ScoreUpdate[]         Full history of every update within a run.         Used by the sparkline chart in the audit panel.

scores(string,string).notice: agentId → runId → current score (0–100)         Primary mapping — cheap read for the gauge panels.         e.g. scores["researcher"]["run_001"] = 87

updateScore(string,string,uint256,string.notice: Update the trust score for an agent in a specific run.
